creator: jjreynold@home.com
text:
per the message from Susan Giuliano <susang@sbei.com>, Adcomtec has changed its
name to SBE. I'm responding to her situation with the attached patch to
hardware.raw which updates the information for her company.

> [ On Thursday, February 1, Susan Giuliano wrote: ]
> > Please forward to the contact within your organization that can quickly
> > correct the company listing under Adcomtec to the company name SBE.
> >
> > This request has be sent on many occasions and has yet to be fullfilled.
> >
> > Thank you very much,
> > Susan Giuilano

Fix: The following is a patch to be used against /usr/www/en/commercial/hardware.raw. 
Can who ever commits this change please cc: susang@sbei.com when the commit is
done? Thank you.
How-To-Repeat: 
 N/A
